market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Luxury Home for 10 | Free Parking | Group Getaway
analysis.rewritten_desc: Stay in this stunning 4-bedroom luxury home that comfortably accommodates up to 10 guests, perfect for group escapes or family vacations. Benefit from convenient free parking on site, making arrival effortless. Located in a vibrant area [insert key local attraction or nearby landmark], the property offers [insert brief, specific detail about neighborhood perks]. While our guest capacity is 10 adults, the property is particularly guest-focused with [insert any standout features like 'private entrance' or 'spacious layout']. Rated 4.57 by 99 guests, we prioritize comfort with [insert specific feature guests have praised, e.g., 'modern furnishings'] and [another feature]. Book securely for [insert specific dates or season availability] at [insert any unique selling point not covered].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with the property's exterior photo to highlight curb appeal and parking access, as these are the first visual cues potential guests need to assess accessibility and aesthetics
key_diagnosis: Listing is overpriced at +181% vs cohort median while occupancy lags 4.4% below median
Title explicitly claims 'Sleeps 10' when official capacity is only 4 guests
Description is entirely missing, losing opportunity to showcase unique features
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing charges £491/night (+181% above market median) but sits at 23.9% occupancy - 4.4% below typical for this market
